title: The Agents Receive Their Orders
description: On pages 1–8, this part focuses on the agents receive their orders, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Agents Receive Their Orders. Vivi and the Straw Hats decide that stopping the war means confronting Crocodile directly instead of chasing the rebels blindly. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Brown. CHA-iro in Japanese, Brian in French. The color of mother earth. Speaking of which, imagine what a pain having brown toilet paper would be... right? I mean, you wouldn't be able to see "it" at all... right?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What, is this conversation too gross for you? You're telling me to stop?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Okay then! Let's begin the 19th volume of one piece!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The oasis town of Rainbow where Crocodile is currently at is here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: All we really have to do is head North from Yuba.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's a day's walk away from here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, don't worry. Despite the ongoing chaos in other parts of the country, Rainbase is a vibrant casino-town.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Don't get any strange ideas now...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: So there are some towns that are unaffected by the rebellion...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Are they still goin' at it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We finally have some water now so gimme some...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That the old man spent all last night digging up!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna let you or anyone drink it away that easily!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, so you do have some self- restraint.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Alright, alright. Let's get a move on.

summary: This part develops the agents receive their orders and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
